subcodes.title: Kitab al-Vahid 20 (Tablet to "Him Who will be made manifest)
subcodes.first_line: Glorified is He before Whom all the dwellers of earth and heaven bow down in adoration and unto Whom all men turn in supplication.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الملاک المعزز. سبحان الذی یسجد له من فی السموات و من فی الارض و کل له قانتون هو الذی بیده
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @station of the Manifestation of God
full_text_parts: Glorified is He before Whom all the dwellers of earth and heaven bow down in adoration and unto Whom all men turn in supplication. He is the One Who holdeth in His grasp the mighty kingdom of all created things and unto Him shall all return. He is the One Who revealeth whatsoever He willeth and by His injunction “Be Thou” all things have come into being.
